name: Victor Beauventre — “The Juice”
description:
Victor is a character from Deviant Art made by Oscarvanderhof. And yeah, i’m lowkey obsessed with him.

More information about him based on his reference sheet:

Age: 19

Pronounce: He/Him/His

LGBT:

  • Has a physical condition that transforms him into a blueberry frequently

    ﻿﻿has a personal portable juicer

    Has a physical condition that transforms him into a blueberry frequently

  • ﻿﻿has a personal portable juicer

  • ﻿﻿transformation frequency is accelerated by sugar consumption

  • ﻿﻿College track star

  • ﻿﻿Proud & competitive, but kind & considerate; not toxic

  • ﻿﻿Complete idiot

  • ﻿﻿Absolutely fucking brainless

  • ﻿﻿Has an INSATIABLE candy addiction (despite the risk to his condition, because he's a moron)

  • ﻿﻿Exposes his prized abs

  • Says "bro" a lot

    at literally any chance﻿﻿

  • Got the nickname "The Juice" by being able to run for ages; never running out of juice

    ﻿﻿typically stays positive; is in college mostly because of his track scholarship, and his bros were worried that his newly-acquired condition might damage the scholarship and send him back to live with his parents, but the first thing he worried about after getting juiced for the first time was whether or not he still had his prized abs
